title: Disciplined Entrepreneurship
subtitle: 24 Steps to a Successful Startup
author: Bill Aulet
themes: Entrepreneurship is a discipline, not a mystery
Market selection is the most critical decision
Iterative validation over static business plans
awards: Used as textbook at MIT and other universities
excerpt: There is no entrepreneurship gene. Entrepreneurship can be taught. There are real skills — people management, sales, product conception — that can be learned. This is the roadmap.
